message:
style(engine): rustfmt pass across 10 source files and update Cargo.lock

Automated formatting cleanup: line-breaking long expressions, adjusting
indentation for multi-line if-let chains, merging nested if-let blocks
into combined && let chains (same semantics, cleaner style), function
signature line-wrapping, and assert macro formatting.

Files: baseline_interpreter.rs, bulkhead.rs, execution_cell.rs,
extension_host_lifecycle.rs, causal_replay.rs,
controller_interference_guard.rs, declassification_pipeline.rs,
expected_loss_selector.rs, opportunity_matrix.rs, franken-verify.rs.

Cargo.lock updated for dependency version bumps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -129,7 +129,7 @@ checksum = "d9c4f5dac5e15c24eb999c26181a6ca40b39fe946cbe4c263c7209467bc83af2"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-decision"
-version = "0.2.5"
+version = "0.2.6"
 dependencies = [
  "franken-evidence",
  "franken-kernel",
@@ -138,15 +138,15 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-evidence"
-version = "0.2.5"
+version = "0.2.6"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-kernel"
-version = "0.2.5"
+version = "0.2.6"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
 ]
